$description: Table component tokens — structural data table. Tables are flat (radius.none, no shadow): hierarchy comes from the muted header row, quiet row separators, and tint fills for zebra/hover/selected states.

table.$description: Data table visual language. The frame is the page itself — no card chrome; separators (border.muted) carry the structure. Hover tint appears only on interactive tables (accent green = interactivity, per the hard rules); selected rows pair the tint with a solid action rail.

foreground.$description: Column header text — muted, uppercase, all-caps tracking. Recedes so data leads. 6.3:1 AA on canvas.

separator.$description: Border between rows — separator within a surface, the lowest decorative rung.

background.$description: Even-row fill when zebra striping is on — the neutral elevated surface.
Hovered row fill on interactive tables only — quiet green tint signals the row is clickable.
Selected row fill — same quiet tint as hover; the solid rail is what marks persistence.

rail.$description: 3px inset left rail on the selected row — solid phosphor green, the strongest row state.

foreground.$description: Body cell text — primary foreground. 12.3:1 AAA on canvas, 11.2:1 AAA on the zebra fill.
